summary: EXP-178 provides 4 surgical patches to data/sections.json part4.html (block p4-41-0). P1 inserts a short notation paragraph before the Group B table disambiguating dome-side WIN-NNN labels from our-review WIN namespace. P2/P3/P4 append a dagger (<sup>†</sup>) to the three WIN-NNN cells (rows 18 WIN-075, 20 WIN-076, 28 WIN-073) that reference dome-side identifiers past our registry cap. Consistent with Part 2b's existing notation precedent. No stub WIN entries added to wins.json (would inflate count incorrectly). Decider: apply patches in order, rebuild via `node build.js`, close ISS-1109.
